recommendations.title: My Bloody Valentine
recommendations.overview: Twenty years after a Valentine's Day tragedy claimed the lives of five miners, Harry Warden returns for a vengeful massacre among teen sweethearts gearing up for another party.

recommendations.title: White Noise 2: The Light
recommendations.overview: A man's family brought back from the verge of death, he then discovers he can identify people who are about to die.

recommendations.title: Trick
recommendations.overview: A detective tries to track down a masked killer who reappears every Halloween to wreak bloody havoc.

recommendations.title: Flesh & Blood
recommendations.overview: Kimberly, a teenager suffering from agoraphobia, has not left the house since her mother's unsolved murder. On the eve of Thanksgiving, she begins to suspect that the safe harbor of home and her doting father may be a dangerous mirage.

recommendations.title: Dracula III: Legacy
recommendations.overview: Dracula leads vampire hunters Father Uffizi and Luke back to Eastern Europe, and a country plagued by civil war.

recommendations.title: Aftermath
recommendations.overview: A returning war veteran, stricken with PTSD, gets trapped with his teenage sister on Boston's Tobin Memorial Bridge when a heavily armed group of ex-military revolutionaries take everyone hostage.

recommendations.title: The Prophecy 3: The Ascent
recommendations.overview: As the War in Heaven and on Earth rages on, Pyriel, the Angel of Genocide, rises to power, intending to destroy all of mankind. The only one who stands in his way is street preacher Danyael, who was born of an Angel and a woman, the nephilim.

recommendations.title: Dracula 2000
recommendations.overview: When a team of techno-savvy thieves break into a high-security vault, they don't discover priceless works of art... they find a crypt unopened for 100 years.

recommendations.title: Dracula II: Ascension
recommendations.overview: A group of medical students discover the body of the infamous count. Soon, they find themselves in the middle of a bizarre and dangerous conflict when a shadowy figure offers them $30 million for the body so that he may harvest his blood.

recommendations.title: Play Dead
recommendations.overview: Criminology student Chloe fakes her own death to break into a morgue, in order to retrieve a piece of evidence that ties her younger brother to a crime gone wrong. Once inside, she discovers that a sadistic coroner is using the corpses for his sick a
